### MF-P3-02 — Chest/breast/clothing lane + S08 material parse (spec: 08 §3, 07 S08)

- ☑ **MF-P3-02.01** -- S08 fuse: SCHP clothing classes + Sapiens skin/clothing + GDINO garment boxes → material regions · skin = Sapiens skin ∧ ¬clothing · bra/underwear only with evidence (SCHP class or GDINO box), else `clothing_generic`
    - Evidence: fuse_material_evidence combines SCHP garments, Sapiens skin/clothing and GDINO boxes, enforces skin=skin_seed minus clothing, explicit bra/underwear evidence gates and generic remainder, and emits indexed uint8 map; focused gated/no-gate tests and full 259-test suite passed.
- ☑ **MF-P3-02.02** -- Thin-structure pass: skeletonize clothing · width < 4% torso width → strap (vertical-ish over shoulder, id 10) / waistband (horizontal at iliac line, id 11)
    - Evidence: thin_structure_pass skeletonizes clothing, requires local width<4% torso, classifies vertical shoulder-touching components as strap ID10 and horizontal iliac components as waistband ID11; focused orientation fixture and 259-test suite passed.
- ☑ **MF-P3-02.03** -- Sheer detection: clothing region with skin-tone chroma similarity > 0.8 to adjacent skin → `lace_or_sheer` (12)
    - Evidence: detect_sheer computes normalized chroma cosine similarity against adjacent skin and marks clothing >0.8 as lace_or_sheer; proportional skin-chroma region passes while opaque blue region fails in focused test; full suite passed.
- ☑ **MF-P3-02.04** -- SAM2 edge-refine every material region · glove/sock rule: hand/foot region ∧ clothing texture → material 15 (protects hand lane)
    - Evidence: refine_material_regions requires and runs one SAM2 plan for every region; glove_or_sock is hand/foot intersection clothing texture and wins material-map priority ID15; focused refinement/protection test and full 259-test suite passed.
- ☑ **MF-P3-02.05** -- Chest crop clavicle-to-under-bust × 1.4 · breast ellipse seeds from landmarks · profile → single visible breast · back view → lane skipped, breast states `not_visible`
    - Evidence: chest lane creates clavicle-to-under-bust square crop x1.4 at 1024 with schema transform; character-perspective front/3-4 seeds both, profile one, back skips and marks both not_visible; focused crop/view tests and full 265-test suite passed.
- ☑ **MF-P3-02.06** -- Visible-truth rule in code: skin visible → PART follows skin contour (material skin) · clothed → PART follows fabric-defined visible contour (material bra/top…) · `*_breast_skin` derived = PART ∩ material-skin (empty when fully clothed = CORRECT)
    - Evidence: visible_breast_truth defines PART from visible skin-or-fabric contour and derives each breast_skin exactly PART&skin; fully clothed fixture retains PART with both skin derivatives empty; focused identity tests and 265-test suite passed.
- ☑ **MF-P3-02.07** -- Projected drafting: `*_breast_projected_region` ellipse refined by clothing-surface luminance-curvature (shape-from-shading lite), clipped to torso · lands ONLY in `projected\`, never the PART map
    - Evidence: projected_breast_region refines ellipse with clothing luminance curvature and clips torso; writer only accepts a directory literally named projected and rejects masks/, preventing PART authority entry; focused containment/writer test and full suite passed.
- ☑ **MF-P3-02.08** -- Strap/inframammary SAM2 refinement + `clothing_boundary_chest` 4 px transition band · mandatory zoom panels
